essence: Installs and maintains solar photovoltaic systems for homes, businesses, and renewable‑energy projects.

identity.title: Solar PV Installer
identity.summary: Installs, configures, and maintains solar photovoltaic systems, ensuring safe operation, optimal performance, and reliable clean‑energy generation.

salary.notes: Specialists in commercial systems, battery integration, or large‑scale solar farms can exceed £52k-£65k+.

qualifications: Training in electrical installation or renewable‑energy systems
Knowledge of solar PV components and wiring
Ability to install, test, and maintain solar systems
Understanding of electrical safety and building regulations

lifestyle.description: Solar PV installers work for renewable‑energy companies, electrical contractors, and solar‑installation firms. They install rooftop and ground‑mounted solar systems, connect inverters, integrate batteries, and ensure safe operation. The role suits individuals who enjoy hands‑on technical work, problem‑solving, and contributing to the clean‑energy transition.

habits: Installs rooftop and ground‑mounted solar panels
Connects inverters, wiring, and electrical components
Performs system testing and safety checks
Works with electricians, engineers, and energy planners
